source_pr.title: planner: support global binding fuzzy matching
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #48875

Problem Summary: planner: support global binding fuzzy matching

### What changed and how does it work?

planner: support global binding fuzzy matching

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: {`create global binding using select /*+ order_index(t1, a) */ a from *.t1 where a<10 order by a limit 10`, (pkg/bindinfo/fuzzy_binding_test.go)
failure_signature: {`create global binding using select /*+ order_index(t1, a) */ a from *.t1 where a<10 order by a limit 10`, (pkg/bindinfo/fuzzy_binding_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: This PR adds global binding fuzzy matching (e.g., bindings using wildcard schemas like `*.t1`). The case data does not clearly isolate a flaky/non-deterministic trigger from CI logs or a minimal repro, so we mark it as insufficient_evidence rather than forcing it into an ordering category.
fix_pattern: Support fuzzy matching for global bindings (wildcard schema like `*.t1`)

evidence: evidence: {`create global binding using select /*+ order_index(t1, a) */ a from *.t1 where a<10 order by a limit 10`, (pkg/bindinfo/fuzzy_binding_test.go)

files: pkg/bindinfo/BUILD.bazel, pkg/bindinfo/bind_record.go, pkg/bindinfo/binding_match.go, pkg/bindinfo/capture_test.go, pkg/bindinfo/fuzzy_binding_test.go, pkg/bindinfo/global_handle.go, pkg/bindinfo/global_handle_test.go, pkg/bindinfo/session_handle.go, pkg/bindinfo/session_handle_test.go, pkg/bindinfo/tests/bind_test.go, pkg/planner/core/plan_cache.go, pkg/session/BUILD.bazel, pkg/session/bootstrap_test.go
